# StemCyte

## About
StemCyte is a global regenerative therapeutics company founded in 1997 in Baldwin Park, California. We operate both a private and public cord blood bank — one of the only banks in the world to offer both.

## What We Do
- Private cord blood and cord tissue banking for families
- Public cord blood donation for patients in need of transplants
- FDA-licensed cord blood therapy (REGENECYTE®, BLA 125764/0, approved 2024)
- Clinical trials in Long COVID and acute ischemic stroke

## Clinical Track Record
- 2,300+ transplant units shipped worldwide
- 350+ transplant hospitals across 35 countries
- Triple accredited: FACT, AABB, and FDA registered
- Contributed to the first potential HIV cure via cord blood transplantation (the New York Patient, published in Cell, 2023)

## Key Products & Services
- Cord blood banking (annual, 18-year prepaid, and lifetime plans)
- Cord tissue banking
- Public Bank Access (paid add-on providing access to matching donor units)
- StemCyte Access (tiered HLA matching and transplant coordination service)
- LifeSaver Guarantee (full refund + $50,000 + replacement unit if engraftment fails)
- REGENECYTE® (FDA-licensed HPC cord blood product)

## Leadership
- Jonas Wang, PhD — Chairman, StemCyte International
- Tong-Young Lee, PhD — CEO, StemCyte Inc.
- Joseph Rosenthal, MD — Chief Medical Officer (Professor Emeritus, City of Hope)

## Site Structure
- /the-science — How cord blood and cord tissue stem cells work, 80+ treatable diseases
- /why-stemcyte — What makes StemCyte different, clinical track record, accreditations
- /pricing — Plan comparison and enrollment
- /patient-stories — Real families who banked with StemCyte
- /faq — Frequently asked questions about cord blood banking
- /our-story — Company history, milestones, leadership profiles
- /our-story/lawrence-petz — Founding Medical Director, pioneer of cord blood HIV cure research
- /our-story/hiv-remission — The New York Patient: first HIV cure via cord blood transplant
- /regenecyte — FDA-licensed cord blood therapy product
- /public-bank-access — How families can access donor cord blood units
- /clinical-trials — Active StemCyte-sponsored research
- /expanded-access-policy — Compassionate use policy for REGENECYTE®
- /contact — How to reach StemCyte

## Contact

- Email: customerservice@stemcyte.com
